stemHtml: What are the three physiological thresholds and their corresponding altitudes?

options.a: Reaction Threshold (8000 ft), Disturbance Threshold (13 000 ft), Critical Threshold (22 000 ft).
options.b: Reaction Threshold (7000 ft), Disturbance Threshold (10-12 000 ft), Critical Threshold (22 000 ft).
options.c: Disturbance Threshold (5000 ft), Distress Threshold (10 000 ft), Compensatory Threshold (20 000 ft).
options.d: Disturbance Threshold (7000 ft), Reaction Threshold (10-12 000 ft), Critical Threshold (22 000 ft).
